_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: HK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: HK Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after HK Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: has not been posted to the CBX portal or company website
a review is in progress to determine issuer‑relative materiality under Part XIVA of the Securities and Futures Ordinance
Incident Report: Operational and Cybersecurity Update — Harbour Summit Group Limited (CBX stock code: 9A88) — 2H2026

Recent media speculation on sector consolidation reflects third‑party commentary; the Board confirms no definitive agreement is in place and any notifiable transaction would be announced per the Listing Rules.
Except for the matter in item 9–10, all details above reiterate already‑announced information or benign operational notes; no new financial forecast, guidance, or pricing data is provided.

This report excludes personal data of living individuals; names in system logs, if any, are redacted, consistent with PDPO guidance and the Markets Conduct Commission (Hong Kong) circular on cyber incident reporting.
